title: Seunguk & Jiwon's Wedding Invitation
invitationMessage:
The two of us are beginning a new home together.
As we make this promise and step into a new chapter,
we would be grateful if you could join us,
witness this moment,
and celebrate our beginning with us.

ui.heroMessage: With full hearts, we are stepping into the same season together.
ui.heroImageCaption: Please celebrate this special day with us.
ui.galleryNote: Tap a photo to open the full-screen carousel.
ui.accountNote: If you are unable to attend, we have included bank details below.
ui.rsvpNote: Your reply helps us prepare for the day.
ui.footerTitle: Thank you for celebrating with us
ui.footerCopy: We will hold your love and support close for years to come.

ceremony.description: Doors open 30 minutes before the ceremony.

transport.title: Subway
transport.body: The venue is a 3-minute walk from Exit 5 of City Hall Station on Lines 1 and 2.

transport.title: Parking
transport.body: Complimentary parking is available for up to 2 hours in the building garage.

transport.title: Reception Meal
transport.body: A meal will be served in the banquet hall on the same floor after the ceremony.

transport.title: Shuttle
transport.body: A shuttle runs every 20 minutes from Exit 3 of Seoul Station.

notices.title: Photo Zone
notices.body: A photo wall will be ready at the entrance for you to enjoy.

notices.title: With Children
notices.body: A nursing room and resting area will be available for guests coming with children.

notices.title: Program
notices.body: A short thank-you and cake cutting will follow the ceremony.

notices.title: Blessing Gifts
notices.body: Bank details are shared below for guests who are unable to attend in person.

gallery.title: Film Frame One
gallery.caption: A quiet moment from one of our favorite days.

gallery.title: Film Frame Two
gallery.caption: Another scene we wanted to keep close.

gallery.title: Autumn Walk
gallery.caption: Uploaded photos can also be viewed in the full-screen carousel.

gallery.title: Winter Conversation
gallery.caption: Each photo keeps its title and caption as an overlay.

gallery.title: Our Day
gallery.caption: It is designed to feel natural to swipe through on a phone.

gallery.title: Together
gallery.caption: You can return to the editor later and replace any image at any time.

timeline.title: The day we naturally became part of each other's everyday lives
timeline.body: In the middle of busy seasons, we found familiar laughter and comfort in one another.

timeline.title: The conversation that made an ordinary day unforgettable
timeline.body: As we spoke about our future together, we shared a promise we will remember for a lifetime.

timeline.title: The day we take one step forward in the same direction
timeline.body: Now we begin a new season together as family.

rsvp.adminLabel: You can review and manage replies from the editor.
